name: A Gahntze Tzimmes
recipeInstructions:
1. Sear the meat well in hot fat in a Dutch oven or heavy skillet on top of the stove.
2. Transfer the meat to a roasting pan.
3. Peel and cut carrots into 1-inch round slices. Place them around the meat.
4. Add prunes, apricots, and lemon slices to the roaster.
5. Peel sweet potatoes and cut into 1-inch slices. Place over the meat and fruit in the roaster.
6. Combine brown sugar and flour with enough boiling water to make a thin paste.
7. Mix this paste with orange juice.
8. Pour the mixture over the Tzimmes. If necessary, add more boiling water to bring the liquid to the top of the dish.
9. Cover and bake at 400°F for 1 hour.
10. Reduce heat to 325°F and continue baking for 4 1/2 hours.
11. Uncover and bake an additional 30 minutes.
